header.title: Better Communication Across Cultures at Work
header.subtitle: Helping international teams and local staff communicate effectively across cultures
header.description: Practical, discussion-based workshops that support communication and collaboration in international workplaces. I help teams work effectively across cultures, understand different communication styles, and recognise and respond to misunderstandings when they arise.

about.title: About
paragraphs: I am an intercultural trainer specialising in communication and collaboration in multicultural workplaces.
I work in higher education and with companies and bring international experience from living and working in different countries.
My workshops are interactive and discussion-based and support participants in developing practical communication and soft skills for working across cultures.
My background includes a degree in psychology and sociology, a diploma in intercultural competence, and a Master`s degree in Adult Learning in Global Change.

offer: Working with international colleagues and clients
Understanding different communication styles across cultures
Recognising and responding to cross-cultural misunderstandings
whoFor: Teams made up of different nationalities
Companies working in an international business environment
Staff working with international clients or colleagues
Teams that want to improve collaboration and avoid misunderstandings
situations: Team members interpret communication styles differently
Different expectations around feedback and participation
Collaboration is affected by unclear communication across cultures

contact.text: Get in touch to discuss your team`s needs:
contact.location: Based in Austria - workshops available in-company and online
